name: Fortuna Bus Co Inc
registry_source: NY Department of State, Division of Corporations - DOS ID 3287716
notes: No USDOT/SAFER record located under 'Fortuna Bus' (Brooklyn intrastate school-bus operator; not required if interstate threshold not met). FORTUNA TRANSPORTATION INC (USDOT 1608638, FL) is a different unrelated FL dirt-hauling carrier; FORTUNATE TRADING INC (USDOT 1922779) is also unrelated. NYSDOT operator profile confirms FORTUNA BUS COMPANY INC at 1329 36th St, Brooklyn, NY 11218 with Operator ID 40442, classified Large, 92 inspections SFY 2023-24, 1.09% out-of-service rate, 'Preferred' operator. Per Staten Island Advance, Fortuna operates ~42 school buses in NYC. NY DOS: domestic business corporation, Kings County, filed 12/1/2005, status Active.

name: Premiere Bus Co Inc
registry_source: NY DOS (not directly resolvable); listed on Nextdoor at 925 Shepherd Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11208, phone (718) 927-1589
notes: No FMCSA SAFER match under 'Premiere Bus' for Brooklyn. PREMIERE ROUTES INCORPORATED (USDOT 1677657) is in Brooklyn but located at 25 Franklin St, 11222 (Greenpoint) with 1 power unit and is intrastate private property (general freight) - that is not the Premiere Bus Co at 925 Shepherd Ave. The 925 Shepherd Ave address in Brooklyn 11208 (East New York) hosts multiple loosely affiliated bus companies (Premiere Bus Co, MJT Bus Company, Pride Transportation Services Inc, Approved Transportation Service Inc) with phone numbers in the 718-927-15XX block, suggesting common ownership/dispatch. Premiere Bus Co does NOT appear in NYSDOT Bus Operator Profiles (SFY 2022-23 or SFY 2025-26), indicating either inactive operations, very small fleet, or operating under a different legal name. NY DOS direct lookup not accessible via web fetch. Bizapedia page for this entity returned HTTP 410 Gone (suggesting entity may be dissolved/de-listed).
